10475255.title: The Situation Room With Wolf Blitzer
10475255.description: Anchor Wolf Blitzer invites CNN correspondents, analysts and guests for timely coverage of the day's news events. Patterned after the concept of the White House Situation Room, the Monday-Saturday show is a discussion forum often with opposing sides debating current national affairs.

10476241.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
10476241.description: It's Erin Burnett's turn to step out front and try to maintain a viable viewer presence for CNN in the weekday news arena. But the former CNBC anchor won't worry about ratings for her hourlong general news program, comparing that burden to "death." Instead, she'll concern herself with translating world events into relevant information for viewers, paying close attention to such topics as the Middle East and women's issues. "I want people to say that our show is smart. I want our show to be authentic", Burnett says in a promo. "I want our show to have courage". Left unsaid, of course, is that she wants her show to have a big audience, too.

10476478.title: Anderson Cooper 360
10476478.description: Cooper brings his prickly but often witty perspective to current events and personalities in the news. He is joined by a series of guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

10477418.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
10477418.description: Stanley Tucci eats and drinks his way around Milan. Here, Stanley enjoys an aperitivo, feels inspired to make pizzoccheri, a noodle made from buckwheat, and enjoys classic Milanese veal chops and risotto.

10478376.title: Don Lemon Tonight
10478376.description: Don Lemon presents the biggest stories, newsmakers, and spirited conversations of the day.

10480337.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
10480337.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

10481279.title: World Sport
10481279.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10481360.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
10481360.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

10483317.title: World Sport
10483317.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10483401.title: CNN Newsroom with Rosemary Church
10483401.description: Live from Atlanta, Rosemary Church brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

10485315.title: Early Start
10485315.description: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

10486278.title: New Day With John Berman and Brianna Keilar
10486278.description: John Berman and Brianna Keilar report the latest news and top stories.

10488309.title: World Sport
10488309.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10488388.title: First Move With Julia Chatterley
10488388.description: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

10489347.title: Connect the World
10489347.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

10490271.title: World Sport
10490271.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10490362.title: Connect the World
10490362.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

10491361.title: Inside Politics
10491361.description: With veteran Washington correspondent John King in the anchor chair, `Inside Politics' focuses on the top political stories of the day with a rotating round table of top sourced reporters from CNN and from other media outlets. The half-hour program gives viewers an inside look at the stories driving Washington, directly from reporters on the ground. Prior to its revival in 2014, `Inside Politics' was first headed by Judy Woodruff, and it aired for more than 20 years on CNN before its cancellation in 2005.

10492283.title: Inside Africa
10492283.description: A surge of creative energy is flowing through Rwanda where filmmakers, visual artists, entertainers and more are rewriting their own narratives and helping to shape countries future.

10492358.title: Amanpour
10492358.description: Peabody Award-winning journalist Christiane Amanpour, CNN's chief international correspondent, hosts this half-hour weeknight interview program, with each episode focusing on a newsworthy topic and featuring guests, from global leaders to heads of state and cultural icons, who are comfortable challenging conventional wisdom.

10494152.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
10494152.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

10494362.title: Quest Means Business
10494362.description: Richard Quest and a team of correspondents analyze the facts and figures from the business world to help people earn money and spend it wisely.

10495356.title: The Lead With Jake Tapper
10495356.description: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.

10496368.title: The Lead With Jake Tapper
10496368.description: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.
